capabilities.name: view
capabilities.description: View your own profile and public profile fields of others.

capabilities.name: update
capabilities.description: Change your own profile details, avatar, and preferences.

capabilities.name: view
capabilities.description: Open chat threads you are allowed to access.

capabilities.name: send
capabilities.description: Send messages in chats you belong to.

capabilities.name: delete_own
capabilities.description: Delete messages you authored within retention rules.

capabilities.name: moderate
capabilities.description: Remove or flag others' messages per community policy.

capabilities.name: delete_any
capabilities.description: Delete any message in scoped chats regardless of author.

capabilities.name: view
capabilities.description: View store listings and catalog information.

capabilities.name: create
capabilities.description: Register new stores under allowed scopes.

capabilities.name: update
capabilities.description: Edit store profile, hours, and storefront configuration.

capabilities.name: delete
capabilities.description: Remove a store and its merchant configuration.

capabilities.name: manage_offers
capabilities.description: Create and edit offers, pricing, and promotions.

capabilities.name: view
capabilities.description: Use map views and browse public pins and regions.

capabilities.name: share_location
capabilities.description: Publish or update your own location markers where allowed.

capabilities.name: view
capabilities.description: See active offers and deal details.

capabilities.name: create
capabilities.description: Draft new offers for stores you manage.

capabilities.name: update
capabilities.description: Change offer terms, inventory links, and visibility.

capabilities.name: delete
capabilities.description: Retire or permanently delete offers.

capabilities.name: manage
capabilities.description: List, inspect, and remove community join invitations.

capabilities.name: view
capabilities.description: List and inspect user accounts within your scope.

capabilities.name: create
capabilities.description: Provision new user accounts or invitations.

capabilities.name: update
capabilities.description: Edit user records, flags, and non-auth fields.

capabilities.name: delete
capabilities.description: Deactivate or delete user accounts.

capabilities.name: assign_types
capabilities.description: Grant or revoke user types and capability bundles.

capabilities.name: view
capabilities.description: Read your notification inbox and delivery history.

capabilities.name: manage
capabilities.description: Send or schedule platform or community notifications.

capabilities.name: update_own
capabilities.description: Change personal settings such as theme and language.

capabilities.name: update_any
capabilities.description: Override another user's preferences or feature flags.

capabilities.name: manage_strings
capabilities.description: Edit translation catalogs and locale rollout settings.

capabilities.name: config
capabilities.description: Change environment-level configuration and feature switches.

capabilities.name: view_logs
capabilities.description: Read application and audit logs for investigations.
